since_last: 21% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.46%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 21% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.95% · BTC -2.77% · Gold -2.64% · Nasdaq100 -0.96%. 21% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.46%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.46%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.84%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.84%, BIDU +4.49%, AVGO +4.01%, ANET +3.67%, AMBA +1.90%. Laggards: UPST -6.14%, PANW -6.02%, CRNC -5.00%, RXRX -4.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.55% at $148.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
